title: Atlas and sketchbook richness phase
summary: Sixty-fifth structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-2 wave deepens atlas-facing memory and sketchbook authorship payoff while keeping the archive shell small and notebook-like.

execution_order.why_now: The richer world now wants a stronger remembered-world payoff.
A slightly deeper filed-memory seam can make the world feel more personal.
The remembered world should deepen without growing a bigger archive shell.
A small authorship follow-on can make the memory payoff feel warmer.
The sketchbook is the most personal current seam for this payoff.
The authorship payoff should stay light and notebook-like.

guardrails: Do not add a larger archive page.
Do not add a freeform sketch editor.
Reuse the current atlas, note, close-look, and sketchbook seams only.
acceptance_focus: The remembered world feels deeper and more personal.
Atlas and sketchbook payoffs stay compact.
Lane 2 remains content-facing rather than system-heavy.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-2.md, docs/reports/2026-04-02-atlas-and-sketchbook-richness-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as lane 2's later long-push wave after the nursery-linked habitat memory work: deepen atlas-facing memory and sketchbook authorship payoff without opening a bigger archive shell.
